steps.title: Identify the underlined sentence's purpose
steps.content: The underlined sentence uses the phrase “on the other hand” to define horizontal gene transfer by setting it against vertical gene transfer. Its structural role is to clarify one process through a direct contrast with a similar process.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices, confirm the correct one
steps.content:
• Choice A — It proposes a direction for future research into a biological phenomenon.: the sentence defines a process; it makes no suggestion about future research. ✗
  • Choice B — It explains a biological process by contrasting it with a somewhat similar process.: matches the contrast structure — horizontal gene transfer is explained via its difference from vertical gene transfer. ✓
  • Choice C — It argues that two biological phenomena are more similar than they may initially appear to be.: the sentence highlights difference, not similarity. ✗
  • Choice D — It explains why a common perception of a biological process is flawed.: the sentence introduces a contrast, not a correction of a misconception. ✗
That is the correct answer.
